_comment: SaleCraft MCP server connections. Accessed via Service System Deep Research connector proxy (mcp_tool_call), not hosted directly by this plugin. URLs are resolved at runtime via the connector — see lib/mcp-patterns.md for routing details.

landing_ai_mcp.description: Landing page generation, brand management, content tools, reels, and ad generation

zereo_social_mcp.description: Social media publishing (Meta/TikTok), ad campaigns, influencer matching, and QR codes
